title: facility — field classification
description: Facilities are commercial reference data (public within the tenant). ResourceBookings carry user identifiers (internal) + financial data (confidential). DayPasses have anonymous PII sub-fields (confidential, redacted at 90 days). Passes carry pricing + assignment info (confidential). No health / medical / minor-specific data on any row — those attach through the User side.

confidential: Facility.pricing_json (tenant-competitive information — competitors would benefit from seeing rate cards)
DayPass.issued_to_profile_name (anonymous walk-in PII; redacted at 90 days)
DayPass.issued_to_profile_phone (anonymous walk-in PII; redacted at 90 days)
regulated_minor: DayPass.issued_to_profile_age_band (when 'under_18') — combines with anonymous walk-in profile to identify a minor. GDPR + national children's-data-protection laws apply.
regulated_financial: Facility.pricing_json (every mutation writes to audits with 7-year retention)
DayPass.price_amount_cents + price_currency + receipt_number (POS transaction financial record)
Pass.total_credits + used_credits (drives revenue recognition per credit consumed)
audit_log: ResourceBooking.price_amount_cents (never mutable after create; attempted changes logged)
Pass.used_credits (every increment — audit for double-spend disputes)

notes: The redactor pipeline strips DayPass.issued_to_profile_name + phone on egress for callers who lack facility.day_passes.view-anonymous permission (a follow-up permission for the compliance surface).

Facility.pricing_json is CONFIDENTIAL because competitor tenants gaining access would extract sensitive rate-card information. The `platform.facilities.view` permission is restricted to super_admin + ops + support for the same reason.
PCI-DSS scope: NO card / PAN / CVV fields on any owned row. DayPass.payment_method is a category enum. Payment references upstream Finance module tokens (Wave 4).

ResourceBooking.notes is a STAFF-VISIBLE operational field — bookers do not see it in the wire projection. Used for staff annotations like 'coach requested extra towels' or 'complimentary guest access approved by manager'.

regulated_minor tagging on DayPass.issued_to_profile_age_band applies ONLY when the value is 'under_18'. When 'adult' or 'senior', the row is not minor-regulated. When 'unknown', treat as internal (safe default).
